About Me

Designing
with heart

I'm Karthick V, a Product Designer (UI/UX) from Tamil Nadu, India. I focus on Digital Product Design — bridging the gap between user needs and development by crafting high-fidelity prototypes that are ready to code.

With a background in Information Technology and hands-on experience at FinityStack, I blend technical understanding with design intuition to create products that are both beautiful and functional.
